semantic_source_model.rule: Natural language remains the semantic source; inventory rows make coverage, validation, and downstream conservation checkable.

elements.label: Submit one-page design brief
elements.validation_rule: must remain the only primary user task

elements.label: Brief Intake
elements.validation_rule: must remain the only real page unless human review approves a product expansion gap

elements.label: Project name
elements.validation_rule: missing value blocks generation and returns missing-field copy

elements.label: Audience
elements.validation_rule: missing value blocks generation and returns missing-field copy

elements.label: Page type
elements.validation_rule: selected value must stay within the single page fixture

elements.label: Primary user goal
elements.validation_rule: missing value blocks generation and returns missing-field copy

elements.label: Business constraint
elements.validation_rule: missing value blocks generation and returns missing-field copy

elements.label: Page type
elements.validation_rule: must have an interaction edge and must not create a second page

elements.label: Save draft
elements.validation_rule: must preserve draft without starting validation

elements.label: Validate brief
elements.validation_rule: must open validation overlay

elements.label: Generate DRD
elements.validation_rule: must start governed generation only after required input passes validation

elements.label: Retry
elements.validation_rule: must retry validation or generation after recoverable failure

elements.label: Edit brief
elements.validation_rule: must return focus to editable brief fields without losing draft

elements.label: Close
elements.validation_rule: must close overlay without deleting draft content

elements.label: Empty draft
elements.validation_rule: generate unavailable while required fields are blank

elements.label: Editing draft
elements.validation_rule: save draft is available after at least one field is entered

elements.label: Validation overlay
elements.validation_rule: overlay checks source completeness and possible expansion gaps

elements.label: Recoverable failure
elements.validation_rule: retry and edit paths must be available

elements.label: Final DRD ready
elements.validation_rule: FINAL_DRD.md and review evidence must exist before entering this state

elements.label: Validation overlay
elements.validation_rule: must act as the only system handoff for validation and generation progress

elements.label: Transient failure message
elements.validation_rule: must be plain language, same task scoped, and paired with retry and edit actions

elements.label: Missing required field message
elements.validation_rule: must identify missing fields without inventing a new page or capability

elements.label: FINAL_DRD.md
elements.validation_rule: must be source-backed and hash-indexed

rejected_expansion_candidates.reason: A secondary page would exceed the one real page scope.
A multi-user workflow would add a new user task.
Generating a live product page is outside the DRD harness fixture.

human_review_required_gap_rule: If a missing element cannot be deduced from the stated task, page, state, overlay, failure path, or locked P1 rule, it must be recorded as a human-review-required gap.
